note: TREASURE (favorite-item) KIT — reconciled 2026-07-17 after the DB sync gained helm's favorite-item prose (was previously the UNTREASURED base kit; the materializer froze that, giving the ~0.59 cold board read). Phase 1/2/3 map to skill1/skill2/burst, unlocked sequentially by item count and coexisting once unlocked, so the strongest steady state (long solo raid) has all three active — modeled as such. SKILL1 (both full-charge tiers): lastBullet -> allies critRatePct 14.64/5s (the dropped 'Critical Rate of normal attacks' team buff); every full charge (shotFired, SR = one full charge per pull, liberalio precedent) -> allies fillGauge 14.31 + heal. The 0.59% Max HP full-charge heal is MODELED as a `heal` event (event-only, no HP value) — NOT defensive-noise: it emits a recovery event to all allies every full charge (~1.5s), driving Crown's 'when recovery takes effect -> team ATK +20.99%' to near-permanent uptime (skipping it left every Crown+Helm team ~15% cold). SKILL2: partsDamagePct 3.08 (inert vs partless boss, kept); fullBurstEnter -> allies attackDamagePct **27.87**/10s (TREASURE value; base kit was 11.85); every full charge (shotFired) -> enemy flatDamage **178.98** (TREASURE 'when hitting a target with Full Charge -> deals 178.98% of final ATK as additional damage' — fires each charged shot, ~doubles her sustained charged-shot damage; crit-default per engine convention, FB by timing). BURST: burstCast -> enemy flatDamage 8236.8 (TREASURE nuke; base kit 1237.5); burstCast -> self chargeDamageMultPct 158.4 for durationSec 13 approximating the 'for 10 round(s)' limit (multiplies BASE charge damage x2.5 -> +396 points, per the collection-item charge rule); burstCast -> allies heal models the 'Recovers 54.45% of attack damage as HP for 10 sec' as a recovery event (S1 already saturates Crown-style consumers, so this is faithful-but-near-redundant). CHARFIX: universal SR bolt-recovery rule (60f charge + 30f recovery) reproduces the validated 90-frame cycle (no charFixes needed). VALIDATION HISTORY (untreasured-era, superseded): 1.40->0.99 (neutral T6), 1.42->1.01 (T3) — those used the OLD runtime parser which DID include treasure, so restoring treasure here re-aligns the model with that validated state. ⚑ full-charge additional-hit trigger read as shotFired (every SR pull = full charge) — verify against a helm focus video that the 178.98% popup lands once per charged shot.
caveats: skill2: the 178.98% full-charge additional hit is modeled on shotFired (every SR pull = one full charge); if a focus video shows it not firing every charged shot, retune the trigger
burst: the 158.4% Charge Damage 'for 10 round(s)' is approximated as durationSec 13 (~8 rounds incl. the mid-window reload; 10 rounds ~= 16-17s)
